name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: Haltom City, TX is home to First Cash Pawn at 4636 Denton Hwy, your local pawn shop offering fast loans and pre-owned merchandise.
description_long:
First Cash Pawn operates at 4636 Denton Hwy in Haltom City, TX as a standalone pawn shop serving the local community. The location is open Monday through Saturday from 10AM to 7PM, and Sunday from 12PM to 6PM, providing convenient access for your pawn needs throughout the week.

At this Haltom City location, First Cash Pawn offers fast loans based on personal valuables, sells pre-owned merchandise, and buys items customers no longer need. Contact the store at +1 817-281-3848 for questions about loan terms, merchandise availability, or to get a quote on items you'd like to pawn or sell.

If you need quick cash in Haltom City, TX, bring a valid ID and the item you'd like to pawn or sell. First Cash Pawn is a trusted local choice for when you need fast lending solutions.
pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states and international markets provide extensive accessibility
Non-recourse pawn loans mean no debt obligation—if you don't reclaim items, you simply lose the collateral
Immediate cash funding without credit checks or income verification required
Accepts virtually any item of value (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, appliances, sporting goods)
Layaway service available with only 10% down payment for customers preferring installment purchases
Publicly traded company (S&P 400, Russell 2000) indicates regulatory compliance and operational stability
Buys gold, silver, and platinum on-the-spot with immediate cash payment
cons: Pawn loans are short-term emergency solutions, not sustainable financing—losing collateral is a real financial loss
Interest rates and fees on pawn loans are not disclosed on website; loan terms and rates vary by state and location
Non-recourse structure means customers forfeit personal property of sentimental or practical value if unable to reclaim
Layaway service charges 10% upfront and likely additional fees, making it more expensive than direct purchase
Primarily targets cash and credit-constrained consumers, indicating customer base has limited financial alternatives
best_for: Individuals needing immediate emergency cash ($100-$5,000+) without credit requirements or waiting periods
People with items of value they can temporarily pledge (jewelry, electronics, tools) but intend to retrieve
Consumers who prefer not to carry debt and are willing to lose collateral rather than face loan obligations
Buyers seeking discounted pre-owned merchandise through FirstCash retail locations
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for individuals facing genuine financial emergencies who have items of value to pledge and need immediate cash without credit checks or debt obligations. The primary caveat is that pawn loans result in loss of personal property if not redeemed within the loan period—this is not a sustainable financial solution and should only be considered when all other emergency funding options are exhausted.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property pledged as collateral
Gold, silver, and platinum buying with immediate cash payment
Retail sales of pre-owned merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, instruments)
Layaway purchase plans with 10% down payment option
Online store locator to find nearest FirstCash location
Online inventory browsing and merchandise discovery
Cash purchases of items of value from customers
Lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through subsidiary AFF network
Pawn loan FAQs and educational resources on pawn process
meta_description: First Cash Pawn at 4636 Denton Hwy, Haltom City, TX. Quick loans and pre-owned merchandise.
